name: Hyde Park Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and Crisco together.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all liquid ingredients (vanilla, water, buttermilk or sour milk).
3. Blend well until smooth.
4. Mix all dry ingredients (sugar, flour, baking soda, salt) thoroughly.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the liquid mixture, blending on low speed of the mixer until just combined. Scrape the bowl frequently.
6. Grease and dust a Bundt pan with fine bread crumbs.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared Bundt pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50-65 minutes or until done.
9. Allow cooling in the pan for 30 minutes.
10. Turn out onto a cake rack.
11. While the cake is cooling, heat sugar and evaporated milk in a double boiler until dissolved (the mixture should not feel gritty when rubbed between fingers).
12. Add melted chocolate and butter to the heated sugar mixture. If desired, add 1-2 teaspoons of hot water to enhance sheen.
13. Pour the icing over the cooled cake.
